# MALPINOHdistro

> Independent global music distribution service. Distribute your music to 150+ streaming platforms worldwide while keeping 100% of your royalties.

MALPINOHdistro helps independent artists release music on Spotify, Apple Music, YouTube Music, and more, with analytics, royalty tracking, team management, and content protection.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of MALPINOHdistro's distribution platform.
- [About](/about): The story and mission behind MALPINOHdistro.
- [Services](/services): Music distribution, analytics, and royalty services we offer.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Subscription plans and pricing details.
- [Blog](/blog): Industry insights, tips, and platform updates.
- [Resources](/resources): Artist guides and educational resources.
- [Marketing Guide](/resources/marketing-guide): How to promote your music releases.
- [Partners](/partners): Streaming platforms and partner integrations.
- [FAQ](/faq): Frequently asked questions about distribution and payouts.
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch with our team.
